message:
fix: replace Math.random() with crypto.randomUUID() for stronger randomness

Swap all Math.random()-based ID generation with crypto.randomUUID() across
history client, support ticket store, transcript processor, and user-id
fallback. This eliminates weak PRNG usage for user IDs, entry IDs, ticket
numbers, session IDs, and dev secrets, improving entropy and reducing
collision risk.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
